calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR 6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Alisa Kim, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
No Appearance by defaulted defendant U.S.A. Hauling, INc., a/k/a USA hauling, Inc., a/k/a USA Hauling, Inc. Real Estate, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on July 10, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 19, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant U.S.A. Hauling, INc., a/k/a USA hauling, Inc., a/k/a USA Hauling, Inc. Real Estate, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $47,144.18.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,238.53
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $561.85, for a total judgment in the amount of $55,144.56.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2017 Continued To Nov-29-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
